expected_visible_relationship: Wheels, sprocket, idler, rollers, and bogie arms must occupy the open inner tread profile in side view, where the mesh visibly leaves empty space for running gear.
actual_visible_diagnosis: v1.2 changed exterior side-plane exposure but did not make the wheels and sidewall read inside the profile opening; the visible result was still no-op churn.
root_cause: The guard optimized the wrong relationship: exterior plane exposure instead of X/Y profile-opening occupancy.
forbidden_next_green: Do not accept a tread revision unless wheel centers and useful disc area are inside the inner tread profile opening and the sidewall is an open perimeter frame, not an opaque face.
visual_acceptance: Cloud/Sense only; local capture is forbidden.
